name: Sneebles The Half Cat
short_description: The world's first score attackin’, tomato smackin’, burrito snackin’, video game about a half cat!
detailed_description:
Sneebles The Half Cat is a fast-paced, white-knuckle retro style arcade game. Help Sneebles protect his burrito from mysterious giant tomatoes that are trying to destroy it. Where did they come from? Will Sneebles ever get a chance to eat his burrito? Find out as you unlock achievements and work toward new high scores!

Featuring


  • Precision gameplay with a focus on chain building to rack up big points.
  • Seven unique magic drops to assist you, including five different power-ups.
  • 31 in-game achievements.
  • An interactive tutorial.
  • Stylized pixel art inspired by the 16-bit era.
  • A dynamic soundtrack composed in the style of 16-bit to match.
  • Expressive characters and animations.
  • An unlockable full-length short cartoon inspired by 90s cartoons (presented in the style of 90s video game cutscenes!)
